subcodes.first_line: Say: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the hearts of them that are near unto Thee were set aflame [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به اشتعلت افئده المقربین و به
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for purity; chastity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
